ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clearly legible. Original certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce (ICC).

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, 2 pages, clearly legible. Issued by Borealis AG with Borealis branding.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks field contains references 2800206064, 86711669, 86711670 — none of which are preceded by or associated with a bank-term label such as 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar. LC exception not activated.

candidates.source: Invoice, line 1, 'Country of origin' column, page 1
Invoice, line 2, 'Country of origin' column, page 1

criteria_checked.details: Certificate remarks contain references 2800206064, 86711669, 86711670. Invoice number is 8860335695. No direct invoice number match. However, the certificate does not explicitly label any of these as 'invoice number' — they appear to be order numbers and delivery numbers.

Certificate consignor 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' is identifiable in invoice — 'Issued by: Borealis AG' and Exporter block 'Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'.
Certificate consignee 'Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S.' is NOT found anywhere in the invoice. Invoice customer is 'Sahra Kablo San.ve Tic. A.S.'.

pairing_validation.reasoning: At least one criterion is met: consignor 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' can be identified in the invoice. Pairing validation passes.

consignor.certificate_value: Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB, Industrivägen 3, 444 86, STENUNGSUND, Sverige
consignor.invoice_value: Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna VAT ID No.: SE502065098101, c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN; Issued by: Borealis AG

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' anywhere in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: The exact name 'Borealis AG' is found in the 'Issued by' block on pages 1 and 2. The full expression 'Borealis AG ... c/o Borealis AB' is found in the Exporter block on page 2 with the address 'SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. Both 'Borealis AG' and 'Borealis AB' are explicitly present in the invoice.

Certificate states 'Sverige' (Sweden). Invoice Exporter block states 'STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. Additionally, Supplier VAT number 'SE502065098101' has SE prefix confirming Sweden. Country verified via both explicit mention and VAT prefix (rule 4.1.2.1).

rules_applied.description: Group structure — consignor name found explicitly in invoice exporter block and issued-by block.
Country verified via SE-prefix in VAT number and explicit 'SWEDEN' in exporter address.

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' in Stenungsund, Sverige. The invoice is issued by 'Borealis AG' (in Vienna) but the Exporter block on page 2 explicitly states 'Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. This is an exact match of the consignor entity name and address. Country Sweden is confirmed by the explicit text 'SWEDEN' and the SE-prefix in the VAT number SE502065098101. Rule 4.1.0 applies: consignor name is explicitly found in the invoice. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Mismatch because invoice issuer address is Vienna, Austria while certificate states Stenungsund, Sweden.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The Exporter block on page 2 explicitly provides the c/o address at Borealis AB, SE-444 86 Stenungsund, Sweden. The 'Issued by' block refers to the registered seat in Vienna, but the Exporter block provides the relevant consignor address. Per rule 4.1.5, differences in street address do not in themselves constitute MISMATCH — the company name and country are verified.

consignee.certificate_value: Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S., NOSAB Sogut Cad. No: 9, 16140 NILUFER BURSA, Turkey
consignee.invoice_value: Sahra Kablo San.ve Tic. A.S., Saray Mah. Untel Sok. N:16, 34768 ÜMRANIYE ISTANBUL, TURKEY

comparison_steps.description: Identify the primary billing party in the invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice 'Customer Name / Mailing address' and 'Customer name/address' both state 'Sahra Kablo San.ve Tic. A.S.' in Ümraniye Istanbul, Turkey. This is the primary billing party.

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.2 – Name comparison: certificate consignee vs invoice customer
comparison_steps.description: Compare 'Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S.' with 'Sahra Kablo San.ve Tic. A.S.'
comparison_steps.details: These are entirely different company names: 'Ayplastik Ambalaj' vs 'Sahra Kablo'. Different core name words. This is not a normalization difference — it is a completely different juridical entity.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Ayplastik' anywhere in the invoice (all pages, all fields).
comparison_steps.details: The text 'Ayplastik' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. The Delivery address also states 'Sahra Kablo San.ve Tic. A.S.'. No field in the invoice references 'Ayplastik Ambalaj'.

comparison_steps.description: Verify if these could be the same juridical party under any normalization rule.
comparison_steps.details: The names share no common words in the identity-bearing portion. 'Ayplastik Ambalaj' and 'Sahra Kablo' are entirely different entities. No normalization rule (4.1.3.2–4.1.3.8) can reconcile these names. Both have the Turkish business form suffix 'San. ve Tic. A.S.' but the core names are completely different.

rules_applied.description: Primary billing field identified as 'Customer Name / Mailing address': Sahra Kablo San.ve Tic. A.S.
Certificate consignee 'Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S.' cannot be identified in the invoice. Different juridical entity.
Gränser för namnmatchning — names are entirely different, not a normalization issue.

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S.' in Nilüfer Bursa, Turkey. The invoice customer (primary billing field) is 'Sahra Kablo San.ve Tic. A.S.' in Ümraniye Istanbul, Turkey. These are completely different company names with no shared identity-bearing words. The word 'Ayplastik' does not appear anywhere in the invoice (searched all pages, all fields including headers, footers, delivery addresses). The delivery address also names 'Sahra Kablo'. No normalization rule can reconcile 'Ayplastik Ambalaj' with 'Sahra Kablo'. Both are in Turkey but are different juridical entities. Result: MISMATCH per rule 4.2.4.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Both are in Turkey so they might be related companies.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.1.3.1 (applied via 4.2), system must not assume group relations, agent relationships, or trading relationships. Being in the same country does not establish identity.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Ayplastik could be a subsidiary or trading name of Sahra Kablo.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: No evidence in the invoice supports this. The name 'Ayplastik' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. Per rule 4.1.3.1, the system must not assume group or subsidiary relationships.

goods_description.certificate_value:
36 PAL = 1980 BAG (25 kg net / bag)
FT3200
goods_description.invoice_value: Line 1: Visico LE4423 Borealis Octabin LD Polyethylene; Line 2: Ambicat LE4476 Bag Catalyst masterbatch

comparison_steps.description: Certificate does not contain a standard article number format. 'FT3200' appears to be a product code/material designation.
comparison_steps.details: 'FT3200' could be treated as a product identifier. Searching for 'FT3200' in the invoice: NOT FOUND. The invoice contains product codes 'Visico LE4423' and 'Ambicat LE4476'. None match 'FT3200'.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate and search in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate's identity-bearing main designation is 'FT3200'. This text string does not appear anywhere in the invoice. The invoice describes goods as 'Visico LE4423 Borealis Octabin LD Polyethylene' and 'Ambicat LE4476 Bag Catalyst masterbatch'. 'FT3200' cannot be matched to any of these without semantic interpretation, which is prohibited.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.5 – Priority 3: Generic goods with invoice reference
comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains a generic description with explicit invoice reference.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate does not contain an explicit invoice reference (e.g., 'according to attached invoice'). The references in box 5 (2800206064, 86711669, 86711670) are order/delivery numbers, not accompanied by an explicit phrase like 'as per invoice'. Furthermore, the certificate does not label these as invoice references. Priority 3 is not applicable.

rules_applied.description: Article number 'FT3200' from certificate not found in invoice.
Identity-bearing main designation 'FT3200' not found in invoice text.

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate describes goods as '36 PAL = 1980 BAG (25 kg net / bag) FT3200'. The product identifier is 'FT3200'. The invoice contains two product lines: 'Visico LE4423 Borealis Octabin LD Polyethylene' (20,425 kg) and 'Ambicat LE4476 Bag Catalyst masterbatch' (1,250 kg). The text 'FT3200' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. The certificate also mentions 1980 BAG while the invoice mentions 50 BAG and 19 OCT + 1 PAL for packaging. There is no explicit invoice reference with 'as per invoice' or similar phrase. The goods description cannot be verified without semantic interpretation. Result: MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: FT3200 might be a grade or product family that includes Visico LE4423 and Ambicat LE4476.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rules 4.3.3, semantic interpretation, synonym matching, and industry-specific assumptions are prohibited. 'FT3200' is a different text string from 'Visico LE4423' and 'Ambicat LE4476'. Without explicit equivalence in the documents, this cannot be assumed.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The references in box 5 might serve as invoice references enabling Priority 3.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Priority 3 (rule 4.3.5) requires an EXPLICIT phrase referring to the invoice such as 'according to attached invoice', 'as per invoice' etc. The certificate contains only numbers in the remarks field without such a phrase. Additionally, the invoice number 8860335695 does not match any of the references 2800206064, 86711669, 86711670. Priority 3 cannot be activated.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'Gross 50.688,00 kg'. This is the verification-basis quantity.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate box 7 states Gross 50,688.00 kg. Weight category: Gross (GW). Unit: kg.

comparison_steps.description: Search for the value 50,688.00 kg in the invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice page 2 states 'Total gross weight 22.533,25 KG'. The value 22,533.25 is not equal to 50,688.00. The value 50,688 does not appear anywhere in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Both certificate and invoice state a Gross Weight. Certificate: 50,688.00 kg GW. Invoice: 22,533.25 kg GW.
comparison_steps.details: Both documents explicitly state a Gross Weight value. The values differ: 50,688.00 vs 22,533.25. Deviation is approximately 124.9%, far exceeding ±0.1% tolerance. This constitutes an explicit contradiction per rule 4.4.3.1.

comparison_steps.description: Check if any quantity exception applies.
comparison_steps.details: 3A: Only one invoice present. 3B: Both already in KG. 3C: Not applicable (multiple lines, not single article). 3D: Sum of invoice line quantities: 20,425.00 + 1,250.00 = 21,675.00 KG (net quantities, not gross). Still not 50,688.00. 3E: No per-row gross weights available. No exception resolves the discrepancy.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value 'Gross 50.688,00 kg' identified as verification-basis quantity.
Value 50,688.00 kg not found in invoice. Invoice total gross weight is 22,533.25 KG.
Explicit contradiction: both documents state GW but values differ (50,688.00 vs 22,533.25).

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states 'Gross 50.688,00 kg' which normalizes to 50,688.00 kg Gross Weight. The invoice on page 2 states 'Total gross weight 22.533,25 KG' which normalizes to 22,533.25 kg GW. Both documents explicitly state a Gross Weight value, and these values differ significantly (50,688.00 vs 22,533.25, a deviation of ~124.9%). This is an explicit contradiction per rule 4.4.3.1. The certificate also mentions 1980 BAG at 25 kg net/bag which would equal 49,500 kg net — but this is net, not gross, and the invoice total net weight is 21,675 kg. No exception (3A–3E) can resolve this. Result: MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The certificate might refer to a different shipment or multiple invoices.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Only one invoice is provided. Exception 3A requires multiple invoices. The system verifies against the provided document pair.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The 50,688 kg might be verifiable via row summation.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Invoice rows sum to 21,675 kg (net). Invoice total gross is 22,533.25 kg. Neither matches 50,688 kg. No summation method yields the certificate value.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has a 'Country of origin' column per line item.
comparison_steps.details: Line 1: Country of origin = Sweden. Line 2: Country of origin = Finland.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'European Community; Sweden'. EU normalization applies.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate origin is 'European Community; Sweden'. Both Sweden and Finland are EU member states (EU-27 post-Brexit). Certificate date is 2023-03-15.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 'Sweden' appears as explicit origin in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice line 1 explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden'. MATCH for Sweden.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1.1 – Additional EU member states in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Invoice also contains 'Finland' as origin for line 2. Finland is an EU member state. Certificate states 'European Community' which is a collective term for EU.
comparison_steps.details: Per rule 4.5.4.1.1: Certificate states 'European Community; Sweden'. Fakturan contains Sweden (explicitly named in cert) and Finland (additional EU member state not explicitly named in cert). All conditions met: (1) Sweden from cert found in invoice ✓, (2) cert states 'European Community' ✓, (3) extra country Finland is EU member ✓, (4) no non-EU origins in invoice ✓. Result: MATCH.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 – Check for non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Verify no non-EU origin appears in invoice that is not covered by certificate.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice origins are Sweden and Finland, both EU member states. No non-EU origin present.

rules_applied.description: EU normalization: 'European Community' accepted as collective EU origin.
Additional EU member states in invoice (Finland) accepted since certificate states 'European Community' and all invoice origins are EU members.
Sweden (specific EU member) explicitly found in invoice.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate origin field states 'European Community; Sweden'. The invoice has explicit 'Country of origin' per line: Line 1 = Sweden, Line 2 = Finland. Sweden is directly named in both cert and invoice → verified. Finland appears only in the invoice but not in the certificate's origin field. However, per rule 4.5.4.1.1, when the certificate states 'European Community' and all extra origins in the invoice are EU member states (Finland is EU-27), this is MATCH. All certificate origins can be identified in the invoice, and no non-EU origins are present. Result: MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because Finland is not explicitly named in certificate origin field.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.5.4.1.1, additional EU member states in the invoice that are not explicitly named in the certificate are accepted when the certificate states 'European Community' or 'EU' and all extra origins are EU members. Finland is an EU member state. MATCH.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet och fakturan avser olika mottagare: certifikatet anger Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S. i Bursa medan fakturan är ställd till Sahra Kablo San.ve Tic. A.S. i Istanbul. Dessutom överensstämmer varken varubeskrivningen (certifikatet anger FT3200, fakturan anger Visico LE4423 och Ambicat LE4476) eller bruttovikten (certifikatet anger 50 688 kg medan fakturan anger 22 533 kg).
overall_assessment.summary: Three checkpoints result in MISMATCH: (1) Consignee — completely different company (Ayplastik Ambalaj vs Sahra Kablo), (2) Goods description — certificate product code FT3200 not found in invoice, (3) Quantity — certificate gross weight 50,688 kg vs invoice gross weight 22,533.25 kg. Two checkpoints MATCH: consignor (Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB verified via exporter block) and country of origin (European Community/Sweden verified with Finland as additional EU member). The document pair appears to be mismatched — the certificate and invoice likely do not belong to the same transaction.
blocking_issues: Consignee MISMATCH: Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S. (certificate) vs Sahra Kablo San.ve Tic. A.S. (invoice) — completely different companies
Goods description MISMATCH: FT3200 (certificate) not found in invoice (Visico LE4423 / Ambicat LE4476)
Quantity MISMATCH: Gross 50,688.00 kg (certificate) vs Total gross weight 22,533.25 KG (invoice) — explicit contradiction

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB, Industrivägen 3, 444 86, STENUNGSUND, Sverige
sections.invoice_value: Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna, c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN; Issued by: Borealis AG
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0): Consignor-namn 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' hittades uttryckligen i fakturans Exporter-block och Issued by-block. Land Sverige verifierat via explicit 'SWEDEN' i adressen och SE-prefix i momsregistreringsnummer.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' i Stenungsund, Sverige återfinns exakt i fakturans Exporter-block på sida 2: 'Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. Landet Sverige bekräftas av den explicita texten 'SWEDEN' och SE-prefixet i momsnummer SE502065098101. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S., NOSAB Sogut Cad. No: 9, 16140 NILUFER BURSA, Turkey
sections.invoice_value: Sahra Kablo San.ve Tic. A.S., Saray Mah. Untel Sok. N:16, 34768 ÜMRANIYE ISTANBUL, TURKEY
sections.rule_applied: Juridisk partskontroll (4.2.2, 4.1.3.1): Certifikatets mottagare 'Ayplastik Ambalaj' och fakturans kund 'Sahra Kablo' är helt olika företagsnamn utan gemensamma identitetsbärande ord. 'Ayplastik' förekommer inte någonstans i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger mottagare 'Ayplastik Ambalaj San. ve Tic. A.S.' i Nilüfer Bursa, Turkiet. Fakturans kund och leveransadress anger 'Sahra Kablo San.ve Tic. A.S.' i Ümraniye Istanbul, Turkiet. Dessa är helt olika juridiska parter med inga gemensamma namnord. Texten 'Ayplastik' återfinns inte någonstans i fakturan. Ingen normaliseringsregel kan förena dessa namn. MISMATCH.

sections.certificate_value:
36 PAL = 1980 BAG (25 kg net / bag)
FT3200
sections.invoice_value: Visico LE4423 Borealis Octabin LD Polyethylene; Ambicat LE4476 Bag Catalyst masterbatch
sections.rule_applied: Artikelnummer/textmatchning (4.3.2, 4.3.3): Produktkoden 'FT3200' i certifikatet återfinns inte i fakturan. Fakturan innehåller andra produktkoder (Visico LE4423, Ambicat LE4476) som inte kan matchas mot FT3200 utan semantisk tolkning.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande produktbeteckning är 'FT3200'. Denna textsträng förekommer inte i fakturan. Fakturan innehåller 'Visico LE4423 Borealis Octabin LD Polyethylene' och 'Ambicat LE4476 Bag Catalyst masterbatch'. Ingen explicit fakturahänvisning med 'as per invoice'-fras finns i certifikatet. Varubeskrivningen kan inte verifieras. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll och uttrycklig motsägelse (4.4.1, 4.4.3.1): Certifikatets bruttovikt 50 688 kg matchar inte fakturans bruttovikt 22 533,25 kg. Båda dokumenten anger explicit bruttovikt men med vitt skilda värden.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger 'Gross 50.688,00 kg' (50 688,00 kg brutto). Fakturans sida 2 anger 'Total gross weight 22.533,25 KG' (22 533,25 kg brutto). Båda dokumenten anger uttryckligen bruttovikt och värdena skiljer sig väsentligt (avvikelse ~124,9 %, långt över tillåtna ±0,1 %). Detta utgör en uttrycklig motsägelse. Inga undantag (3A–3E) är tillämpliga. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering (4.5.4.1, 4.5.4.1.1, 4.5.4.2): Certifikatet anger 'European Community; Sweden'. Sverige finns explicit i fakturan. Finland är ytterligare EU-medlemsstat. Samtliga ursprung i fakturan är EU-länder. Inga icke-EU-ursprung förekommer.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprung 'European Community; Sweden'. Fakturan anger 'Country of origin: Sweden' för rad 1 och 'Country of origin: Finland' för rad 2. Sverige finns i båda dokumenten — direkt verifierat. Finland förekommer enbart i fakturan men är EU-medlemsstat. Certifikatets 'European Community' är ett samlingsbegrepp för EU. Per regel 4.5.4.1.1 accepteras ytterligare EU-medlemsländer i fakturan. Inga icke-EU-ursprung finns i fakturan. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.notes: Three MISMATCH checkpoints (consignee, goods, quantity) → comparison_result = NOT_IDENTICAL. Two MATCH checkpoints (consignor, origin) with confidence ≥ 0.95. Consistency verified: all motivations align with their respective status values. The document pair appears to be incorrectly matched — the certificate and invoice likely relate to different transactions from the same consignor (Borealis AG).
